title: Isn't US Government trying to monopolize AI as a super power?
abstract: The US government recently gave a directive to OpenAI to delay the launch of it Fable 5 rival GPT 5.6 Sol. This comes after they have already put on hold the global public release of Claude Fable 5. Isn't this just creating an AI monopoly, where the most powerful AI models are restricted to onl
abstract_zh: 美国政府最近指示OpenAI推迟推出其Fable 5竞争对手GPT 5.6 Sol的发布。这发生在他们已经暂停全球公开发布Claude Fable 5之后。这不是在创建一个AI垄断吗，最强大的AI模型只对某些人可用？
